attributes.content:
## Overview

The Lab Result card gives the workspace a structured home for lab test result with test name, value, units, reference range, and date.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Lab Result acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Document]]** -- Lab Result can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Report]]** -- Lab Result can feed rollups and summaries that surface trends, status, or outcomes.
- **[[Trigger]]** -- Changes to Lab Result can fire automation, and automation can also create or update Lab Result.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Lab Result can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Contact]]** -- Lab Result often needs a person-level reference for ownership, communication, or accountability.
- **[[Health Record]]** -- Health Record can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Lab Result.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Lab Result as the structured home for lab test result with test name, value, units, reference range, and date and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Lab Result when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Lab Result stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.

cardInfo.name: Lab Result
cardInfo.summary: Lab test result with test name, value, units, reference range, and date.
